en: I can't hear you I think you're on mute You're on mute Unmute yourself
ko: 안 들려. 음소거인 것 같아. 음소거야. 음소거 해제해.

en: Can you hear me now Oh yeah I can hear you now
Oh no Hang on You're breaking up
I didn't catch that You keep cutting out Hello
I give up I'll call you back Where have you gone
ko: 포기. 다시 전화할게. 어디 간 거야?
